creator: Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I have ported 'xsokoban' to FreeBSD.
It follows to the guideline and Mr. Asami's Makefile example
in the handbook. Please take a look.

ftp://ftp.noc.titech.ac.jp/pub/tmp/aki/in.coming/xsokoban.tgz

                 Yukihiro Nakai<Nakai@Mlab.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp>
